epics.title: Role Permission Audit + Owner-Scoped Data Access
epics.archiveNote: Shipped 32/32. HOST accommodation read-leak closed (VIEW_ALL→VIEW_OWN + forced server-side owner-scoping + 404 anti-enum + /options tier + front guard + AC-6 systemic guard). Live e2e smoke passed. Merged via owner override over preexisting ajeno CI red (admin/lint/build, predates branch). SPEC-170 (per-user permission panel) spun off.
epics.note: Atomized into 32 tasks (avg complexity 2.3, 6 phases) via task-from-spec. T-003 owner-review GATE + §12 checkpoints. Backbone: audit → schema _VIEW_OWN → service forced owner-scoping on adminList + _canAdminView on getById + ownership resolver → seed (HOST VIEW_ALL→VIEW_OWN, EDITOR rationale, CLIENT_MANAGER untouched) → /options endpoints + selector migration → beforeLoad guard → AC-1..AC-11 tests. Read-only data-leak fix.

epics.title: Versioned DB Migration Strategy Overhaul
epics.archiveNote: Strategy + tooling + tests + docs delivered; PRs #1372/#1373/#1367 merged. T-024 staging reset+rebuild+seed executed & verified 2026-06-02 (3847 rows, 0 errors, app live). T-025 (prod reset) DEFERRED as a post-spec operational step — run via the validated hops db-migrate --reset / db-seed flow when ready.
